theme.name: Cinematic Editorial
theme.description: A sophisticated, high-contrast, editorial design emphasizing dramatic photography, wide typography, generous negative space, and smooth cinematic transitions. Think high-end art gallery meets luxury travel.

styles.h1: font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-primary
styles.h2: font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary
styles.h3: font-sans text-xl md:text-2xl font-normal tracking-tight text-primary
styles.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary/60

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and labels; avoid centering text blocks unless strictly necessary for a focal hero moment.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Momentum and weight. Do not use fast spring animations. Use slow, ease-out transitions to simulate heavy, physical editorial pages.
motion_and_interactions.custom_cursor: fixed top-0 left-0 w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-gold pointer-events-none z-[100] mix-blend-difference transition-transform duration-100 ease-out

App.instructions: Wrap the app in Lenis (for smooth momentum scrolling) and Framer Motion's AnimatePresence to orchestrate page transitions. Add global Custom Cursor and ReadingProgress (fixed top-0 h-1 bg-gold z-50).

Nav.instructions: Transform into a premium glassmorphic nav. Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F2EB]/70` with a 1px bottom border (`border-[#1A1A18]/10`). Keep logo left, centered nav items, and magnetic 'Inquire' CTA button on right. Provide mobile full-screen drawer nav with massive serif typography.

Home.instructions: Make hero full-bleed (`h-screen`) with cinematic image, dark gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/30 to-transparent`). Use Framer Motion to split-text reveal the quote. TeamEditorial section should use pure HTML/Tailwind custom Tabs (bento-grid layout, no default Shadcn tabs look) with smooth crossfade of team members.

Journal.instructions: Modernize Destination Hubs bento grid. Make cards sharp-edged (`rounded-none`). Tag pills (+ live/soon) in top right corner of image container using Forest green and Gold. Image hover states scale up slowly. Add a horizontal scrolling editorial ribbon (Marquee) separating Destination and Articles.

LosCabos.instructions: Treat as a deep-dive editorial spread. Pin (sticky) the courses image on the left side of the bento grid while the dense logistics/courses text scrolls on the right side. Include bold, high-contrast typography for costs.

Modals_Forms.instructions: Redesign InquiryModal and NotifyModal to not look like typical web modals. Use `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#F5F2EB]/95`, full-height slide-in panel from the right, or massive centered overlay. Inputs should be bottom-border only (`border-b border-[#1A1A18]/30`), no background, tall spacing.

Footer.instructions: High contrast inverse section (`bg-[#1A1A18] text-[#F5F2EB]`). Make the brand name 'GOLF IN MEXICO°' stretch 100% of the container width (`text-[12vw]` fluid type). Newsletter input uses ultra-minimalist single line with a gold arrow.

data_testid_conventions.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
